Notice Of Motion And Motion To Mediate And To Excuse Parties From Judicial Arbitration; Stipulation
Off Calendar Jul-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Reachell Armstrong's Motion to Mediate in Lieu of Judicial Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. Case is ordered scheduled for Jury Trial on 1/23/2012 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give Notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Court Ordered a Mediation Enforcement Order to Show Cause on 10/12/2011 at 10:00 AM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
